bounded_claim_statement: This manifest supports only machine verification of recorded packet/backend/date/calibration-specific Stage 4 hardware artifacts that are present in the repository. It does not support broad quantum advantage, production transformer superiority, full transformer-scale validation, or general cross-backend robustness.

supported: Recompute metrics from real raw-count evidence records that are present in this repository.
Record deferred and unavailable provider targets separately from active sweep records.
Support only bounded packet/backend/date/calibration-specific validation outcomes for the active records.

recorded_evaluation.historical_decoder_note: Earlier generic q1q0 decoding classified this Braket CX record as hardware-negative; provider-aware q0q1 decoding recomputes it from the same raw counts as hardware-positive.
